note: Onboarding scope = wallet-facing cross-chain DEPOSIT surface (Ethereum_SpokePool, cover). SpokePoolPeriphery (swap-and-bridge / native deposit, ~3K EOA/30d) is user-facing but a SEPARATE contract+ABI (swap/permit surface) → DEFERRED #1 follow-up with measured usage-share. MulticallHandler = destination-side message executor (not source pre-sign). HubPool/AcrossConfigStore = LP + dataworker/governance infra (LP surface = separate follow-up), not listed by the mainnet contract-addresses page; out of this wallet-facing slice. Honest floor: I0 enforces only the contracts listed here; LP/infra contracts intentionally out-of-scope.

contracts.name: Ethereum_SpokePool (ERC1967Proxy)
contracts.reason: user cross-chain deposit entry: depositV3 (9,312 EOA/30d) + deposit (3,150 EOA/30d), Dune 7659328

contracts.name: Ethereum_SpokePool (implementation)
contracts.reason: implementation behind the SpokePool proxy — users call the proxy (covered); ABI snapshotted there

contracts.name: SpokePoolPeriphery
contracts.reason: user-facing swap-and-bridge periphery: depositNative (1,934 EOA) + swapAndBridge (1,174 EOA) + depositWithAuthorization (8, solver), Dune 7659341. DEFERRED #1 follow-up — separate ABI with swap/permit surface, out of this deposit-anchor slice

contracts.name: MulticallHandler
contracts.reason: infra: destination-chain message executor for Across `message` payloads — not a source-chain user pre-sign entry
